question: Which county seat corresponds to the New York county that recorded more violent crimes in the year before the year (within 2015-2023) that has the highest total number of drug overdose deaths across U.S. states using December 12 month-ending values and excluding the U.S. total when comparing Erie County and Westchester County? Return the city name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: In the VSRR provisional drug overdose death counts dataset (December 12 month-ending values for 2015-2023, excluding the US aggregate), 2022 has the highest total across states at 109,413.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2015-2023 has the highest total number of drug overdose deaths across U.S. states, using December 12 month-ending values and excluding the U.S. total? (Filter Indicator == "Number of Drug Overdose Deaths", Period == "12 month-ending", Month == "December", exclude State == "US"; sum Data Value by Year; choose the maximum.)

2.fact: According to the NY Index Crimes by County dataset for <node_1 answer - 1>, Erie County had 3,493 violent crimes while Westchester County had 1,520 violent crimes. Erie County (3,493) had more violent crimes than Westchester County (1,520).
2.subquestion: Between Erie County and Westchester County, which had more violent crimes in <node_1 answer - 1>?

3.fact: Buffalo is the second-largest city in New York and the county seat of Erie County.
3.subquestion: What is the county seat of <node_2 answer>?
